stats.label: Speed
stats.iconDescription: White winged boot inside a black hexagon
stats.description: Number of hexes the model may move with an advance action

stats.label: Dodge
stats.iconDescription: White shield with a curved deflecting arrow inside a black hexagon
stats.description: Number an enemy needs on its hit roll when targeting this model

stats.label: Protection
stats.iconDescription: Plain white shield silhouette inside a black hexagon
stats.description: Amount of damage ignored each time this model suffers damage

stats.label: Health
stats.iconDescription: White heart silhouette inside a black hexagon
stats.description: Number of wounds a model can have before it is knocked out

skillIcons.label: Self
skillIcons.iconDescription: White bust silhouette of a single figure inside a black hexagon
skillIcons.description: The skill affects the champion or follower unit using the skill

skillIcons.label: Friendly
skillIcons.iconDescription: White bust silhouette of two gears inside a black hexagon
skillIcons.description: The skill affects a friendly champion or follower unit

skillIcons.label: Area
skillIcons.iconDescription: White hex outline containing a six-pointed star inside a black hexagon
skillIcons.description: The skill affects the models or hexes described in the skill

skillIcons.label: Enemy
skillIcons.iconDescription: White stylized skull inside a black hexagon
skillIcons.description: The skill targets an enemy champion or follower

skillIcons.label: Range
skillIcons.iconDescription: Three small white hexes in a diagonal line inside a black hexagon
skillIcons.description: Maximum number of hexes away a model can be and still be affected

skillIcons.label: Accuracy
skillIcons.iconDescription: White crosshair target (circle with inward-pointing lines) inside a black hexagon
skillIcons.description: Number of dice rolled to hit your target

skillIcons.label: Damage
skillIcons.iconDescription: White square with a large X inside a black hexagon
skillIcons.description: Number of dice rolled to damage your target

boons.label: Move Boon
boons.iconDescription: White circle with a black winged boot and a small plus in the top-left corner
boons.description: +1 speed for its next advance action

boons.label: Dodge Boon
boons.iconDescription: White circle with a black shield-and-arrow and a small plus in the top-left corner
boons.description: +1 dodge for the next hit roll against it

boons.label: Protection Boon
boons.iconDescription: White circle with a black shield and a small plus in the top-left corner
boons.description: +1 protection for the next damage roll against it

boons.label: Accuracy Die Boon
boons.iconDescription: White circle with a black crosshair target and a small plus in the top-left corner
boons.description: +1 die on its next hit roll

boons.label: Damage Die Boon
boons.iconDescription: White circle with a black square X and a small plus in the top-left corner
boons.description: +1 die on its next damage roll

blights.label: Move Blight
blights.iconDescription: Black circle with a white winged boot and a small minus in the top-left corner
blights.description: -1 speed for its next advance action

blights.label: Dodge Blight
blights.iconDescription: Black circle with a white shield-and-arrow and a small minus in the top-left corner
blights.description: -1 dodge for the next hit roll against it

blights.label: Protection Blight
blights.iconDescription: Black circle with a white shield and a small minus in the top-left corner
blights.description: -1 protection for the next damage roll against it

blights.label: Accuracy Die Blight
blights.iconDescription: Black circle with a white crosshair target and a small minus in the top-left corner
blights.description: -1 die on its next hit roll

blights.label: Damage Die Blight
blights.iconDescription: Black circle with a white square X and a small minus in the top-left corner
blights.description: -1 die on its next damage roll
